arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: If the Gunners lose to Ipswich Town on Sunday and Liverpool beat Leicester, Arne Slot's men will seize the title. The club have finished runners up in the previous two campaigns.

arts.ttl: “Spoken to players…” – Mikel Arteta makes exciting Arsenal transfer claim
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has made the exciting claim that players don’t need much persuading to move to the Emirates Stadium. Speaking at his press conference earlier today, Arteta told reporters that he doesn’t necessarily think a big win over someone like Real Madrid has that much of an impact on players’ transfer decisions. arts.sum: Former Arsenal and England midfielder Wilshere has been part of the Canaries' set-up since October, when he left his role with the Gunners' academy to join the Championship outfit. arts.ttl: Man Utd lead Arsenal in race for €80m Rashford replacement
arts.sum: However, Man Utd are expected to face serious competition for Semenyo during the 2025 summer transfer window, with Liverpool set to challenge for his signature, despite the fact that Mohamed Salah has extended his contract with Arne Slot’s side. Man Utd’s pursuit of Semenyo comes following reports that Alejandro Garnacho, Marcus Rashford, Jadon Sancho and Antony could all depart the club on permanent deals this summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have Champions League advantage over PSG they didn't have vs Real Madrid
arts.sum: PSG now await them in the two-legged semi-finals, and the Gunners' boss can go into the match even more confident than against Madrid - having played the French side before. The outcome of Arsenal's quarter-final clash with Real Madrid was tough to predict, with the sides having not faced each other in over a decade.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid very keen on 23-year-old Arsenal target – move will hinge on exit this summer
arts.sum: Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia has a list of suitors as long as his arm this summer, with an exit from the club he is doing plenty to keep in La Liga more than likely.
